get.description: Get health information about the Synergy server.

modelReady.description: Whether at least one AI provider with a usable model is configured

get.description: Retrieve process-level Synergy paths that do not require a scope context.

initialized.description: Whether a new git repository was initialized

directory.description: Directory path to initialize git in

get.description: Get the full stats snapshot. Returns cached snapshot if available, otherwise computes incrementally. Use ?recompute=true to force a full recompute from scratch.

parameters.description: Set to 'true' to force a full recompute from scratch

get.description: Force a stats recompute and stream progress updates over SSE until the final snapshot is ready.

200.description: Server-sent events containing progress and final snapshot payloads

get.description: Get a readonly local diagnostics summary for the Synergy server.

post.description: Clean up and dispose all scope runtimes, releasing all scoped resources.
Generate a Holos bind URL for browser-based login. Returns a URL to open in a popup.

get.description: Handles the redirect from Holos after user login. Exchanges the code for credentials.

post.description: Validate and save existing agent credentials. Validates by fetching a ws_token, then saves and reloads the Holos runtime.

delete.description: Remove the active Holos account credentials and stop the Holos runtime. Used for sign-out.

post.description: Reload the Holos runtime connection. Useful when the WebSocket disconnects.

get.summary: List all agenda items across scopes

delete.description: Archive a scope. Archived scopes are hidden from the list but can be restored.

parameters.description: Filter sessions updated before this timestamp (milliseconds since epoch)

parameters.description: Only include top-level sessions (exclude subsessions). Default: true

Restore all previously reverted messages in a session.

Get all pending question requests across all sessions.

confirm.description: Must be true to confirm the reset operation

anchor.description: Unix timestamp (ms) to anchor the first tick

glob.description: File glob pattern to watch for changes, e.g. 'src/**/*.ts'

event.description: Specific file event to match. If omitted, triggers on any event

debounce.description: Debounce window before firing, e.g. '500ms', '2s'. Default: '500ms'

token.description: Auto-generated secret token for the webhook URL

hint.description: Brief description of what this session contains

AgendaScope.description: Scope where the item was created

SessionEndpoint.description: Endpoint context if created from a session endpoint

sessionID.description: Session where the item was created

lastRunSessionID.description: Session ID of the most recent execution

persistentSessionID.description: Reused session ID for persistent session mode

consecutiveErrors.description: Consecutive error count, reset on success

global.description: If true, item is visible from all scopes

prompt.description: Instruction for the agent when triggered

agent.description: Agent to use, defaults to configured default

sessionMode.description: Session mode override. Recurring triggers (cron, every) default to 'persistent' (reuse session across fires). Set 'ephemeral' to start a fresh session on every fire — useful for tasks that must not carry history from previous runs, such as daily reports.

sessionRefs.description: Sessions whose content may be relevant — injected as context references

wake.description: Whether to wake the origin session's agent on completion

silent.description: Whether to suppress result delivery entirely

autoDone.description: If true, automatically set status to done after first successful fire. Used by agenda_watch.

messages_page_up.description: Scroll messages up by one page

messages_page_down.description: Scroll messages down by one page

messages_half_page_up.description: Scroll messages up by half page

messages_half_page_down.description: Scroll messages down by half page

messages_toggle_conceal.description: Toggle code block concealment in messages

input_line_home.description: Move to start of line in input

input_line_end.description: Move to end of line in input

input_select_line_home.description: Select to start of line in input

input_select_line_end.description: Select to end of line in input

input_visual_line_home.description: Move to start of visual line in input

input_visual_line_end.description: Move to end of visual line in input

input_select_visual_line_home.description: Select to start of visual line in input

input_select_visual_line_end.description: Select to end of visual line in input

input_buffer_home.description: Move to start of buffer in input

input_buffer_end.description: Move to end of buffer in input

input_select_buffer_home.description: Select to start of buffer in input

input_select_buffer_end.description: Select to end of buffer in input

input_delete_to_line_end.description: Delete to end of line in input

input_delete_to_line_start.description: Delete to start of line in input

ServerConfig.description: Server configuration for synergy serve and web commands

cors.description: Additional domains to allow for CORS

allowUnsignedLocal.description: Allow unsigned local plugins with user consent

autoApproveBuiltin.description: Auto-approve builtin plugins without user consent

denyHighRiskThirdParty.description: Block third-party plugins with high-risk capabilities

requireSignatureForMarketplace.description: Require cryptographic signature for non-local plugins

thirdPartyDefaultMode.description: Default isolation mode for third-party plugins (npm, git, url)

highRiskRequiresProcess.description: Require process isolation for high-risk plugins regardless of source

allowThirdPartyInProcess.description: Allow third-party plugins to request in-process mode (not recommended)

allowWorkerMode.description: Allow plugins to request worker thread isolation

allowLocalInProcess.description: Allow local plugins to run in-process

enabled.description: Enable the public GitHub-backed plugin marketplace

registryUrl.description: URL of the official plugin registry.json index

includeLocalRegistry.description: Include the local development registry in marketplace search and detail routes

cacheTtlMs.description: Remote marketplace cache TTL in milliseconds

offlineCache.description: Use stale marketplace cache for browsing when the remote registry cannot be reached

ControlProfileId.description: Default control profile applied to all agents

description.description: Description of when to use the agent

hidden.description: Hide this subagent from the @ autocomplete menu (default: false, only applies to mode: subagent)

color.description: Hex color code for the agent (e.g., #FF5733)

steps.description: Maximum number of agentic iterations before forcing text-only response

path.description: Override path to the external agent binary

model.description: Default model for this external agent

auto_discover.description: Whether to auto-discover this agent on startup (default: true)

disabled.description: Disable this variant for the model

enterpriseUrl.description: GitHub Enterprise URL for copilot authentication

setCacheKey.description: Enable promptCacheKey for this provider (default false)

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for requests to this provider. Default is 900000 (15 minutes). Set to false to disable timeout.

anyOf.description: Timeout in milliseconds for requests to this provider. Default is 900000 (15 minutes). Set to false to disable timeout.
Disable timeout for this provider entirely.

EmbeddingConfig.description: Embedding model configuration. When absent, a local model is used automatically.

baseURL.description: Base URL for the embedding API

apiKey.description: API key for the embedding service

RerankConfig.description: Rerank model for memory retrieval refinement. Disabled when not configured.

baseURL.description: Base URL for the rerank API

apiKey.description: API key for the rerank service

enabled.description: Enable agent-initiated memory curation via chronicler (default: true)

topK.description: Max entries per category to retrieve (default: 3)

threshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold for duplicate detection (default: 0.75)

simThreshold.description: Minimum cosine similarity for retrieval candidates (default: 0.7)

wSim.description: Weight for similarity in hybrid score (default: 0.5)

wQ.description: Weight for Q-value in hybrid score (default: 0.5)

explorationConstant.description: UCB1 exploration constant — scales √(ln(N)/n) visit-decay bonus (default: 0.5)

qInit.description: Optimistic Q-value initialization per reward dimension (default: 1.0)

dedupIntentThreshold.description: Intent cosine similarity threshold for deduplicating experiences (default: 0.85)

dedupScriptThreshold.description: Script cosine similarity threshold for deduplicating experiences (default: 0.8)

qHistorySize.description: Maximum Q-value history entries per experience (default: 50)

snapThreshold.description: Threshold for snapping reward dimensions to discrete {-1, 0, 1} (default: 0.5)

legacyRewardConfidence.description: Default confidence for legacy scalar reward format (default: 0.3)

encoderRetries.description: LLM retry count for intent/script/reward generation (default: 3)

digestToolOutputBudget.description: Max estimated tokens for tool output in turn digest (default: 800)

encoderToolFieldBudget.description: Max chars per tool input field in encoder context (default: 500)

encoderToolOutputBudget.description: Max chars for tool output in encoder context (default: 300)

rewardWeights.description: Weights for multi-dimensional reward composition (default: outcome=0.35, intent=0.25, execution=0.2, orchestration=0.1, expression=0.1)

rewardDelay.description: Number of subsequent turns to wait before evaluating reward (default: 2)

encode.description: Auto-encode conversation patterns into experiences (default: true)

retrieve.description: Inject relevant past experiences into prompts (default: true)

autonomy.description: Enable autonomous background routines like anima daily wake (default: true)

McpRetryConfig.description: Retry policy for connecting to this server

maxAttempts.description: Maximum connection attempts before giving up

backoffMs.description: Initial backoff delay in ms between retries

backoffMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to backoff on each retry

cooldownMs.description: Cooldown period in ms before a retry cycle resets

McpToolFilterConfig.description: Filter which tools are exposed from this server

maxOutputBytes.description: Maximum tool output size in bytes

ttlMs.description: Time-to-live for cached tool list in ms

command.description: Command and arguments to run the MCP server

cwd.description: Working directory for local MCP servers

environment.description: Environment variables to set when running the MCP server

enabled.description: Enable or disable the MCP server on startup

timeout.description: Deprecated legacy timeout in ms for MCP operations. Prefer connectTimeout/listTimeout/callTimeout.

required.description: If true, this MCP server is required for the configured workflow

connectTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for initial connection handshake

listTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for listing tools

callTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for tool call execution

idleShutdownMs.description: Idle time in ms after which the server is shut down

clientId.description: OAuth client ID. If not provided, dynamic client registration (RFC 7591) will be attempted.

clientSecret.description: OAuth client secret (if required by the authorization server)

scope.description: OAuth scopes to request during authorization

url.description: URL of the remote MCP server

enabled.description: Enable or disable the MCP server on startup

headers.description: Headers to send with the request

oauth.description: OAuth authentication configuration for the MCP server. Set to false to disable OAuth auto-detection.

timeout.description: Deprecated legacy timeout in ms for MCP operations. Prefer connectTimeout/listTimeout/callTimeout.

required.description: If true, this MCP server is required for the configured workflow

connectTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for initial connection handshake

listTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for listing tools

callTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for tool call execution

idleShutdownMs.description: Idle time in ms after which the server is shut down

McpDefaultsConfig.description: Default settings applied to all MCP servers that don't override them

required.description: If true, this MCP server is required for the configured workflow

connectTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for initial connection handshake

listTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for listing tools

callTimeout.description: Timeout in ms for tool call execution

idleShutdownMs.description: Idle time in ms after which the server is shut down

domain.description: Feishu domain (feishu for China, lark for international)

botOpenId.description: Bot open_id used to verify real @mentions in group chats

streamingThrottleMs.description: Minimum interval between streaming card updates in ms

groupSessionScope.description: Session scoping strategy for group chats

inboundDebounceMs.description: Debounce rapid-fire messages from the same sender in the same chat (0 = disabled)

resolveSenderNames.description: Resolve sender display names via Feishu contact API

replyInThread.description: Reply in thread when message is part of a topic

streaming.description: Default streaming setting for all accounts

SandboxConfig.description: Sandbox configuration for workspace boundary enforcement

enabled.description: Enable the sandbox runtime when available (default: true)

fallbackPolicy.description: How to proceed when the requested sandbox runtime is unavailable (default: 'warn')

backend.description: Force a specific sandbox backend. 'auto' (default) selects the platform-native backend. Valid: 'auto' (platform default), 'seatbelt-deny-default' (macOS deny-default SBPL), 'seatbelt-legacy-allow-default' (macOS allow-default SBPL), 'synergy-sandbox-linux' (Linux bundled bwrap), 'bwrap-inline-debug' (Linux in-tree bwrap debug), 'windows-restricted-token' (Windows MVP), 'windows-elevated' (Windows full, future).

mode.description: Network access mode within the sandbox (default: 'restricted')

denialLogger.description: Log sandbox denials via macOS Seatbelt (default: true)

bundledBwrap.description: Use the bundled bwrap binary instead of system bwrap (default: true)

landlockFallback.description: Fall back to Landlock LSM when bwrap is unavailable (default: true)

helperPath.description: Path to the synergy-sandbox-windows.exe helper binary

verifyHelperHash.description: Verify the helper binary SHA-256 hash before use (default: true)

privateDesktop.description: Create a private desktop for the sandboxed process (default: true)

conpty.description: Use ConPTY for pseudo-terminal support (default: true)

ObservabilityConfig.description: Local logs, traces, and diagnostics settings

enabled.description: Enable local observability trace JSONL events (default: true)

retentionDays.description: Days to retain local trace files (default: 7)

maxBytes.description: Maximum total trace storage in bytes (default: 250MB)

stalledToolMs.description: Milliseconds without tool activity before emitting a stalled-tool trace event

portalUrl.description: Holos portal URL for browser-facing pages (bind/start)

EmailSmtpConfig.description: SMTP transport settings for outgoing emails

secure.description: Use TLS/SSL for the SMTP connection
Use TLS/SSL for the IMAP connection

model.description: Model to use for this category (e.g., 'sii-openai/GPT-5.2')

promptAppend.description: Additional prompt context to inject for this category

description.description: Description of when to use this category

$schema.description: JSON schema reference for configuration validation

theme.description: Theme name to use for the interface

timeout.description: Timeout configuration for agent turns, provider requests, and tool execution

invoke_sec.description: Max wall-clock seconds for one agent turn (default: 900 = 15min)

ttfb_sec.description: Max seconds to wait for first byte (TTFB) from provider. Accommodates reasoning/thinking models (e.g. o1-pro, deepseek-r1). Default: 600 = 10min

idle_sec.description: Idle timeout in seconds (0 = disable, default: 180 = 3min). Resets on each data chunk.

wall_sec.description: Hard wall-clock timeout per HTTP request in seconds (0 = disabled, default: 0). CAUTION: conflicts with streaming — will interrupt normal token output. Only enable if you need a hard cap beyond idle+TTFB

default_sec.description: Default timeout per tool execution in seconds (default: 300 = 5min)

overrides.description: Per-tool timeout overrides by tool name, e.g. { bash: 600, webfetch: 120 }

autoupdate.description: Automatically update to the latest version. Set to true to auto-update, false to disable, or 'notify' to show update notifications

disabled_providers.description: Disable providers that are loaded automatically

enabled_providers.description: When set, ONLY these providers will be enabled. All other providers will be ignored

model.description: Default model in the format of provider/model, eg anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5

nano_model.description: Cheapest model for trivial extraction tasks like title generation, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to mini_model → mid_model → model.

mini_model.description: Lightweight model for simple tasks like intent extraction, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to mid_model → model.

mid_model.description: Mid-tier model for internal agents that need moderate reasoning (script extraction, reward evaluation, code exploration), in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model.

thinking_model.description: Deep thinking model for complex reasoning and architecture tasks, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model if not set.

long_context_model.description: Model with extra-large context window for processing very long inputs, in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model if not set.

creative_model.description: Model for creative and visual tasks (UI design, writing, artistry), in the format of provider/model. Falls back to the default model if not set.

vision_model.description: Model for image analysis via the look_at tool, in the format of provider/model. If not set, look_at is disabled.

default_agent.description: Default agent to use when none is specified. Must be a primary agent. Falls back to 'synergy' if not set or if the specified agent is invalid.

username.description: Custom username to display in conversations instead of system username

provider.description: Custom provider configurations and model overrides

channel.description: Channel configurations for messaging platform integrations

instructions.description: Additional instruction files or patterns to include

auto_classifier.description: Enable LLM risk classifier to auto-allow safe permission asks (Stage 4 auto mode)

timeout.description: Seconds before unanswered questions auto-expire (0 = no timeout, default 1800 = 30min)

auto.description: Enable automatic compaction when context is full (default: true)

prune.description: Enable pruning of old tool outputs (default: true)

overflowThreshold.description: Fraction of usable context that triggers auto-compaction (default: 0.85)

maxHistoryImages.description: Maximum number of historical images to send as base64 per request (older images replaced with text placeholders). Default: 8.

openTelemetry.description: Enable OpenTelemetry spans for AI SDK calls (using the 'experimental_telemetry' flag)

primary_tools.description: Tools that should only be available to primary agents.

continue_loop_on_deny.description: Continue the agent loop when a tool call is denied

mcp_timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for model context protocol (MCP) requests

pluginConfig.description: Per-plugin configuration namespaces. Keys are plugin IDs, values are plugin-specific config.

category.description: Custom category configurations for background tasks. Categories define model and prompt presets.

muted.description: Toast types to suppress. The underlying logic still runs but the visual card is not rendered.

durationOverrides.description: Override auto-dismiss duration in ms per toast type (max 30s).

source.description: Why this interaction mode applies, e.g. 'agenda' or 'channel:feishu'

preAuthorizedActions.description: Tool names pre-authorized by the user via system scheduling (e.g. agenda wake). Bypasses the ask gate for these tools within this session only.

status.description: Current status of the task: pending, in_progress, completed, cancelled

priority.description: Priority level of the task: high, medium, low

id.description: Unique identifier for the todo item

status.description: Current status: pending, running, blocked, completed, failed, cancelled

deps.description: IDs of nodes this depends on. Empty array for root nodes

assign.description: Suggested executor: self or one of the registered specialized subagent identifiers

task_id.description: Background task ID currently or previously associated with this node

session_id.description: Subagent session ID currently or previously associated with this node

memo.description: Short node-local memo for important result, blocker, or handoff context

result.description: Execution result (trajectory summary or error) populated automatically on completion — do not set manually

nextRunAt.description: Next scheduled activation time, or null for open-ended triggers

triggerTypes.description: Trigger types that can activate this agenda item

triggers.description: Display-safe trigger details for client-side formatting

global.description: Whether this agenda item is globally visible

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when this question was asked

MemoryCategory.description: Filter by a single memory category

MemoryRecallMode.description: Filter by a single recall mode

scopeID.description: Scope that owns the agenda item

sessionID.description: Session where the item was created

firstPrompt.description: First user prompt for the loop
